summary: RC-10 Go Live / Pedreira Alfa — Backend 18/18 PASS, Frontend 100% PASS. Login for pcm/operador/gerente/viewer @palfa.com all succeed with organization_id. Isolation verified: PALFA PCM sees exactly 4 ativos (BM-001, CT-001, PV-001, BC-001) all with organization_id=PALFA; OS listing scoped to PALFA only. Estoque P0 fix confirmed: POST /api/estoque with unidade='PÇ' (free string) succeeds (201) and is persisted (list shows sku=TEST-PC-001, unidade='PÇ'). Dossie: /api/dossie/pesquisa?tag=BM-001 returns 1 result (OS 2026-00001); /api/dossie/os/{id} returns ativo_unidade='Unidade Pedreira' and ativo_sector='Britagem Primária' (clean, no trailing spaces). Public portal /api/public/ativo/{bm001_id} returns tag=BM-001 (nested under 'ativo'), unidade='Unidade Pedreira', area='Britagem Primária'. Master P0 fix confirmed: /api/admin/users returns users from BOTH ASTEC and PALFA orgs (org_ids include both). RBAC PALFA: viewer POST OS → 403; operador POST OS → 201; gerente GET /dashboard/stats → 200; gerente POST OS → 403. Regression ASTEC: master sees ASTEC-only ativos (org_id=ASTEC on all), no PALFA tag leakage; /api/dashboard/stats → 200. GUI login (empresa='Pedreira'→Pedreira Alfa option→pcm@palfa.com/alfa123→Entrar) succeeded, sidebar shows 'Pedreira Alfa', Ativos page shows 4 assets with 'Unidade Pedreira › Britagem Primária/Secundária' breadcrumbs.

minor.issue: The free-text q= parameter only matches OS.numero and OS.titulo (and inspecao.tipo for inspections). It does NOT search the ativo.tag field. Review request expected q=BM-001 to return the OS on that asset. The dedicated tag= filter works. Consider extending the q= search to also lookup ativos by tag/nome and OR their ids into the OS/inspecao query. File: /app/backend/routes/work_orders.py lines 767-771.

rc10_verification_matrix.isolation_ativos_palfa_4_items: PASS (BM-001, CT-001, PV-001, BC-001 all org=PALFA)
rc10_verification_matrix.dossie_pesquisa_by_q_ativo_tag: FAIL (?q=BM-001 returns 0; endpoint does not search ativo.tag by q)
rc10_verification_matrix.master_cross_org_users: PASS (both ASTEC and PALFA org_ids returned)
rc10_verification_matrix.regression_astec_ativos: PASS (55+ ativos, no BM-001 leak, all org=ASTEC)
rc10_verification_matrix.gui_palfa_login_flow: PASS (empresa autocomplete→Pedreira Alfa option, sidebar 'Pedreira Alfa' visible)
rc10_verification_matrix.gui_palfa_ativos_page: PASS (4 cards with 'Unidade Pedreira › Britagem …' breadcrumbs)

action_items: OPTIONAL (medium): Extend /api/dossie/pesquisa q= to also search ativo.tag/nome and OR their asset_ids into OS/inspecao queries. Currently only tag= filter searches by asset tag. Review request implied q=BM-001 should return OS 2026-00001. Suggested fix in /app/backend/routes/work_orders.py near lines 767-771: if q, resolve matching ativo ids by tag/nome regex and add {ativo_id: {$in: matched_ids}} to $or, in addition to numero/titulo match.
NONE ELSE — all P0 fixes (UnidadeEstoque enum→string; master admin/users cross-org) verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: models.py EstoqueCreate.unidade is now plain str='UN' (line 332) — confirmed accepts 'PÇ' and any free string. Good.
server.py admin_list_users correctly branches on user['role']=='master' to omit organization_id filter, returning cross-org users. Good.
routes/work_orders.py dossie_pesquisa: q= only searches OS.numero/titulo — does not include ativo tag/nome in q resolution. Minor gap vs. request spec (see action items).
Public portal /api/public/ativo/{id} returns unidade/area at top level but tag nested under .ativo — inconsistent shape; either flatten or document. Not blocking.

PALFA seed created cleanly: 4 ativos, 1 unidade 'Unidade Pedreira', 2 areas 'Britagem Primária' + 'Britagem Secundária'. Trailing-whitespace issue noted in iteration_85 for ASTEC 'UNIDADE CEDRO ' does NOT affect PALFA — 'Unidade Pedreira' is clean.
test_credentials: PALFA org=5ea998af-ee7e-4549-9fc9-11b338335793; ASTEC org=9a232bf2-fc01-4253-813f-8df356be31c1; pcm@palfa.com/alfa123, operador@palfa.com/alfa123, gerente@palfa.com/alfa123, viewer@palfa.com/alfa123; master@maintrix.com/master123 (ASTEC org). All logins require organization_id.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_ estoque item created (sku=TEST-PC-001, unidade='PÇ') and left in PALFA org for verification. One TEST_RBAC OS created by operador@palfa.com in PALFA for the RBAC positive test. Recommend main agent purge sku like TEST-PC-001 and OS with titulo starting 'TEST_' before go-live if strict clean-state is needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RC-10 PALFA go-live validated. Backend endpoints all correct. Only real gap is /api/dossie/pesquisa?q= not searching by ativo.tag (see action items). For any future PALFA test: PALFA org id = 5ea998af-ee7e-4549-9fc9-11b338335793; ativos are BM-001 (id ea15b6f4-541f-471d-bd0e-dbe2b5f784a6, Unidade Pedreira › Britagem Primária), CT-001 (Britagem Primária), PV-001 (Britagem Secundária), BC-001 (Britagem Secundária). OS 2026-00001 is concluída on BM-001; OS 2026-00002 is a TEST probe created by RBAC test. OS field is 'numero' not 'numero_os'; Estoque uses sku/nome/estoque_minimo (not codigo_sku/quantidade_minima). Public portal returns unidade/area at top level, tag nested under .ativo. Master role in admin_list_users omits org filter → returns all orgs' users.
rca_of_the_issue: Not a bug: q= parameter behavior in dossie_pesquisa is documented in code (only OS.numero/titulo & inspecao.tipo). Test contract asked for q=BM-001 but the endpoint's asset-scoped search is exposed via the ?tag= parameter, which works correctly. Recommended enhancement in action items.
